title: Italian-Style Tofu Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Italian-inspired stir fry made with crispy tofu and noodles, featuring a blend of Eastern and Western flavors.

ingredients.name: xtra
ingredients.notes: mixed greens (such as arugula, spinach, and/or kale)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of Vietnamese oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Add noodles and crispy to the skillet, stir-frying for 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt, pepper, and parmesan cheese.
Serve immediately over mixed greens, garnished with additional crispy if desired.
Note: You can also add other Italian-inspired ingredients, such as cherry tomatoes or sliced olives.
Experiment with different combinations to make this recipe your own!
